SOURCE: 24889109.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (24889109.pdf)
SUMMARY: Security+ Certified LAN/WAN, IAVA Routers/Firewalls/Switches/Wi-Fi/VPN Network and Information Systems. Defense Level 1 and 2 Technical Support, Cable Systems Installer/Maintainer, Imaging/Base lining, Current TS-SCI Clearance.
SKILLS: Army, Basic, Cable, Cat 5, Cisco, Encryption, Customer Support, documentation, Firewalls, FTP, information systems, Information Technology, Messaging, Access, Exchange, Windows 7, Networks, Organizational, personnel, radio, reporting, routers, Strategic, switches, TCP/IP, Technical Support, troubleshooting, VOIP, VPN, wiring

SOURCE: 24889109.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: 07/2011 to 12/2012
DESCRIPTION: Level 1 and 2 Technical Support, Trained in Information Assurance security, Implemented satellite and radio communications for computer systems and VOIP, Maintained IT documentation, Deployed countermeasures against security breaches, Integrated Windows 7 across Garrison units.

SOURCE: 24889109.pdf
JOB TITLE: Cable Installer and Maintainer
COMPANY: 
DATES: 11/2010 to 07/2011
DESCRIPTION: Installed and maintained cables for multiple Army posts, Knowledge in wiring infrastructure, Troubleshooting Cat 5 and 6, Fiber termination, Maintained racks, patch panels, switches and routers.

SOURCE: 24889109.pdf
JOB TITLE: Operator
COMPANY: 
DATES: 12/2009 to 11/2010
DESCRIPTION: Facilitated Defense Messaging System (DMS) at the Defense Messaging Center, Responsible for CP-XP, AMHS, DII Guard and Certificate Workstations, Conducted Network Operations functions.

SOURCE: 24889109.pdf
DEGREE: Associate of Arts
INSTITUTION: 
DATES: 12 2014
